CONTACTID.TEXT: Hi, How can I assist?
Hello {0}, did dispatch inform you?
No, just send me here. So what happened here
It's a Hit and Run. But I just shortly talked to the witnesses. Bring yourself up-to-date by talking to the involved ones.
Okay, I will do so.
I will make sure that we don't get a traffic jam here.
Hi, I'm office {0} from the {1}. Can you tell me what happened?
Shit... my head hurts.. where is my girlfriend..?
She left in the helicopter. She needs to get to the hospital as quickly as possible.
Fuck, were is that fucking bastard..
What bastard, Please tell me what happened.
A car pushed my off the road. I think it was a
I will get out a BOLO for that car model. Give me a second.
No stop... I don't know. Maybe it was a different one.Does anyone of the others know?
I will ask them. For now please stay here. Paramedics will take a look at you
Hello, {0}. Do you have any injuries?
Just some small bruisings. Nothing really mentionable.
The other involved person told me that he was forced of the road by another car. Is that true?
Yes. I was directly behind him, maybe a little bit to near... ah whatever.
For now I don't care about that. Can you remember a licence plate or a the car type or maybe the color?
Sorry. No.
Okay thanks, {0} will contact you later.
Hi, my name is {0} from the {1}. Are you okay?
Hello officer, yes I'm okay and luckily I don't have any damage cause I could stop in time.
The other two told me that someone forced them off the road. Car type is a
That's true. I was driving behind them. But the car wasn't a
Well... please tell mr then.
It was a
Thank for your help. You can leave now
Okay. Bye
Hi. How can I help?
Hi Officer. We actually don't know what happened right now.
Okay... Strange. Did anyone see anything?
No. The lifeguards found him about 10 minutes ago, just washed up here.
Okay. I'll question some people here and see if they know anything.
That is all I can tell you!
Hey, did you see what happened?
Nope. I saw a crowd forming, and I wanted to check out what was going on.
Huh. Okay then...
Sorry.
Hey there. Do you know what happened?
Unfortunately, I have no clue. I was just walking and saw him laying there. I tried asking if he was okay, but he didn't answer, so I called 911.
Okay then. Why don't you and your buddies clear the scene. We'll take it from here.
Okay... Damn, hope he makes it.
Hello. You are the one that called 911, correct?
Yes officer. Sorry for calling so late, I'm from Europe and not used to the emergency system in America.
It's okay. Can you tell me what you saw?
~w~ speedboat that hit the surfer.They didn't bother stopping. They hit him and kept on going!
Do you know the direction the boat was heading?
I believe the boat was heading to
Okay. Thank you for your information. Is there anything else you can tell us?
No... unfortunately that's it. Sorry!
A tourist has reported a crime which is maybe connected to your injured surfer.
Hi, everything under control here?
Hi Officer. We are busy keeping the crowd away from the scene
What happened here?
The civilians found him 10 minutes ago and called in the lifeguards. I don't have more for you.
Okay. Thanks for the info. I'll try to find out if somebody knows anything.
That is all I know!
Hello. My name is {0}. I'm from the {1}. Do you know what happened?
No sorry. I just wanted to know what was going on here.
Okay. Please stay away from the scene...
Okay.
Hey there, {0}. Can you tell me what happened here?
Yes. We were training here at the beach when I noticed the body in the sand. We tried to talk to him but he didn't answer, so I called 911.
Anything else?
Nope. Sorry.
Hello. Are you the worker that called 911?
Yeah officer. That's me.
Good. Can you describe what you have seen?
~w~ speedboat that hit the surfer. I think they didn't see him but they hit him and kept on going!
Do you have any idea where the boat went?
You're lucky man. Yesterday I saw the exact same boat in the city. It was in
Thank you. That will make our jobs a lot easier.
Nice to know that I could help you!
A dock worker has reported a hit and run matching your scene location.
Hey Officer. What happened here?
Hey Partner, thanks for coming out. I just got here, but it appears to be a Hit and Run.
Do we have a witness?
Try talking to the lady over there. She might know something.
Will do. Thanks for helping out.
That is all I have for you!
Hey Ma'am. Did you call the ambulance?
Yes I did, officer!
Thank you for that. Can you tell me what happened?
~w~ ran on the curb and hit the man as he attempted to cross the road!
Okay. Did you see the vehicle's license plate?
I did... but I only remember the last 3 digits. They are ~y~
Okay. Thanks for your help. Give this officer a statement and you will be free to go on your way.
Thank you officer. Will do.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hey Officer. What happened here?
Hey Partner, thanks for coming out. I just got here, but it appears to be a Hit and Run.
Do we have a witness?
Try talking to the lady over there. She might know something.
Will do. Thanks for helping out.
That is all I have for you!
Hey Ma'am. Did you call the ambulance?
Yes I did, officer!
Thank you for that. Can you tell me what happened?
~w~ ran on the curb and hit the man as he attempted to cross the road!
Okay. Did you see the vehicle's license plate?
I did... but I only remember the last 3 digits. They are ~y~
Okay. Thanks for your help. Give this officer a statement and you will be free to go on your way.
Thank you officer. Will do.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
